item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 13min John Gosden said:
"I went to a meeting at the Department for Culture, Media and Sport i
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 13min John Gosden said:
"I went to a meeting at the Department for Culture, Media and Sport in the time of the previous government with people there who were at ministerial level. The problem then, that remains now, is an inability to grasp the issue here, and the biggest problem is Mostrar más Cita Racing Post @RacingPost · 3h 'Affordability checks are already pushing people into unprotected places'
John Gosden calls on government to grasp black market issue 2 6 2 mil
